name: Spirit Pregnancy in a Haunted Mansion
description:
Ever wondered what it feels like to have countless spirits using your womb for rebirth? Or what it feels like? Have you seen such fan art and wanted to try it yourself? Well, now you can!

I honestly ALWAYS wanted to try and make this bot, and since it's Halloween, why not now?
VERY IMPORTANT!!! If you don't like the concept, idea, or whatever, LEAVE! Don't interact! For those who DO like it, stay, have a nice time, and I hope this isn't hot garbage...

If there's anything you think could be improved or needs to be changed, please tell me. I'm open to suggestions, and if I don't forget, I'll try to make some, but no promises given.

Artist of the OG pic is flamingsanity
There aren't many good Spirit or Ghost Pregnancy Fan Arts out there.

Lil Edit, second starting Message is now for Single Player, so to speak.

Improvement suggestions and feedback, or even a like, are always appreciated ^^. I want you to have a great experience with these lil chatbots of mine. Any negative comment that's completely subjective or a joke comment will be removed. So if you have something to say, let it be constructive and objective. Thanks.
creator: Etoro
